title: False Memory
titleNative: 记忆管理局
synopsis: “For us, good or bad, true or false, it is meaningless.” When the world around you isn't what it seems, you may be in the midst of a Bug Man; powerful being who can warp the very nature of one's memories. The Memory Collectors are here to bring order... whether we like it or not.

title: The File of Young Kindaichi Returns 2
titleEnglish: The File of Young Kindaichi Returns 2
titleNative: 金田一少年の事件簿R【リターンズ】
synopsis: This year's 33rd issue of Kodansha's Weekly Shounen Magazine announced that Seimaru Amagi and Fumiya Sato's Kindaichi Shounen no Jikenbo R (The File of Young Kindaichi Returns) manga will get a second anime adaptation that will premiere in Japan in October. The magazine will reveal more information about the anime adaptation in future issues. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Deimos no Hanayome: Ran no Kumikyoku
titleRomaji: Deimos no Hanayome: Ran no Kumikyoku
titleNative: 悪魔の花嫁 蘭の組曲
synonyms: Akuma no Hanayome: Ran no Kumikyoku
synopsis: Deimos no Hanayome: Ran no Kumikyoku revolves around high school girl, Minako Ifu, who has become the focus of the attentions of Deimos, former god of terror. For the forbidden love between him and his younger twin sister, Venus, the former goddess of love, he was turned into a demon by Zeus, and she was imprisoned in the Swamp of Death. In order to rescue Venus from her fatal punishment, he has to bring Minako, who appears to be her physical reincarnation, to the underworld so she can possess her body. Adapting a chapter of the manga, this OVA is centered on Minako visiting the mansion of an infamous botanist in search and investigation of her missing friend.

title: Ao Oni The Animation
titleNative: 青鬼 The Animation
synopsis: The film Ao Oni The Animation will be closer to the traditional mystery horror of the original game, although it will have a new story that is different from the original game, novelization, and live-action films. The story takes place in a suburban town by a mountain forest. The five members of the high school's folklore research club are trying to think of ideas for the culture festival when they discover a former member's collection of research notes from 40 years ago. The legend described in the notes resembles a popular free game called "Ao Oni," so they choose the game as their culture festival theme. They are able to meet with the game's creator, but shortly afterward the creator dies mysteriously. The club members are investigating the mystery at the school when the door shuts and they find themselves locked inside. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: LUPIN THE IIIRD: The Movie - The Immortal Bloodline
titleRomaji: LUPIN THE IIIRD THE MOVIE: Fujimi no Ketsuzoku
titleEnglish: LUPIN THE IIIRD: The Movie - The Immortal Bloodline
titleNative: LUPIN THE IIIRD THE MOVIE 不死身の血族
synonyms: Lupin the IIIrd the Movie: Nieśmiertelny rodowód
Lupin The IIIrd - The Movie: La Stirpe Immortale
synopsis: A special invitation has been sent to Lupin and his crew to an uncharted island. The invitee is believed to be the mastermind who controls the world's top mercenaries and is connected to crimes throughout the world! Who could this mysterious person be? The answer lies on the uncharted island hidden away from existence. To find out the identity of the mastermind and steal his vast wealth, Lupin and his crew as well as Inspector Zenigata, in his attempt to capture them, are led to this mysterious island. The island is shrouded full of mysteries including old discarded tanks and firearms along with strange and mysterious inhabitants. Supposedly the dead assassins from his past are there waiting for Lupin and his friends. (Source: POM Anime)

title: Jie Moren
titleNative: 戒魔人
synopsis: When Freshman Zhou Xiaoan put on a ring of unclear origin, a terrifying devil leaps from his mouth and his life is changed forever. Shocking historical secrets are slowly revealed - a Blood Devil calling itself King Zhou of Shang, a race of heart-eating zombies; a dubious group of Taoist Priests that fight against them; mysterious beings of the supernatural world who can blend in to human society.

title: Detective Opera Milky Holmes: Summer Special
titleRomaji: Tantei Opera Milky Holmes: Summer Special
titleEnglish: Detective Opera Milky Holmes: Summer Special
titleNative: 探偵オペラ ミルキィホームズ サマー・スペシャル
synopsis: A special program of Tantei Opera Milky Holmes produced by the staff of the TV series. After some pushing by Irene and her father and a lack of support otherwise, Kokoro stubbornly quits her job as a police detective to become an idol. She soon finds the idol life draining and starts to miss her old detective life. When Henriette notices Sherlock's loneliness without her, she stages a statue theft in order to convince Kokoro to return to the force. (Source: AniDB)

title: Midnight Eye Goku II
titleNative: MIDNIGHT EYE ゴクウII
synopsis: Goku, the lone wolf private detective is back, contracted by Ryoko, a mysterious, beautiful and very afraid woman, to find and save her brother, Ryu. Will Goku be able to protect Ryoko from her step father`s soldiers long enough to find her brother? Meanwhile Ryu, the unfortunate subject of a military experiment gone bad, leaves a trail of bodies behind him and has no intention of being found or saved by anyone. Will Goku have to kill the man he is supposed to save? Will even his omniscient cybernetic eye and sceptre be enough to help him defeat this indestructible killing machine? (Source: AniDB)

title: Princess Knight
titleNative: リボンの騎士
synopsis: Princess Sapphire is a girl raised as a Prince. Through the mischief of an angel, the princess is born with both a girl's body and boy's mind. Since there is no boy successor in her kingdom, Sapphire is raised as a boy, but evil ministers try to reveal her secret. Unable to put up with the kind of vicious conduct prevailing in the kingdom, Sapphire disguises herself as "Princess Knight" and wields her sword of justice. This is an animated version of the girls' manga featuring Sapphire's romance and adventure, which marked the first made-for-TV animated program geared towards girls in Japan. (Source: Official site)

title: LUPIN THE 3rd vs. CAT’S EYE
titleNative: ルパン三世VSキャッツ・アイ
synonyms: ルパン三世 VS. キャッツ♥アイ
Lupin III vs Occhi di Gatto
synopsis: Hitomi, Rui, and Ai are sisters and cat burglars. They steal a painting from a museum around the same time Lupin the 3rd appears to steal another painting himself. Both paintings are part of Michael Heinz’s series titled the Girl and the Flowers. To the girls, the paintings are clues for their missing father's whereabouts. When they learn Lupin is after the same target, a fire lights inside them. (Source: Amazon Prime Video) Note: A collab animation to commemorate the 50th anniversary of the Lupin III anime and the 40th anniversary of Cat's Eye .

title: Ling Cage
titleNative: 灵笼
synopsis: In the not-too-distant future, the human world has long been overpopulated. Humanity marched to the stars in search of a new home, and just as this was going on, the moon's alignment caused massive earthquakes to ripple across the world, lasting several decades. Humanity was demolished. When the land finally recovered, humanity reemerged to face this strange yet familiar world. Will we, who once lorded over this domain, still remain the masters of this world? (Source: BiliBili)

title: City Hunter: The Secret Service
titleNative: シティーハンタースペシャル ザ・シークレット・サービス
synonyms: ซิตี้ฮันเตอร์ ปฏิบัติการสายลับ
Thợ Săn Thành Phố: Dịch Vụ Bí Mật
synopsis: James McGuire has a dream. He wants to become the president of Guinam and free his people from the military rulers who have been in power up until now. However, one thing stands in McGuire's way: his past. And it's beginning to catch up with him, endangering not only his career, but the life of his long lost daughter. McGuire hires the City Hunter, Ryo Saeba and his partner Kaori to protect his daughter Anna, who herself is a Secret Service agent assigned to bodyguard the presidential hopeful.

title: To You in the Beyond
titleRomaji: Doko yori mo Tooi Basho ni Iru Kimi e
titleNative: どこよりも遠い場所にいる君へ
synopsis: The story centers on a boy named Kazuki Tsukigase, who transfers to a high school on a remote island to get away from anyone who knows him. Kazuki finds out that there is an inlet on the island where people are rumored to disappear. Exploring the inlet, he encounters an unconscious girl. When she comes to after Kazuki takes her to the clinic, she is unable to give out anything about her identity except that she is named Nao, is 16 years old, and whispers the year "1974." (Source: Anime News Network, edited)

title: That is the Bottleneck
titleNative: それだけがネック
synonyms: Ahí está el cuello de botella
synopsis: The employees at the Hot Hot Mart may seem a bit ordinary and mundane. From slightly unproductive chatter and everyone’s obsession with technology, to the laziness of the store manager, is everyone okay...? But everything isn’t as it seems—especially with Muto, the mysterious worker whose face is concealed and is followed by an ominous cat. Get ready to see what happens before the next shift! (Source: Funimation)

tags.name: Work
tags.description: Centers around the activities of a certain occupation.

tags.name: Food
tags.description: Centers around cooking or food appraisal.

tags.name: Dullahan
tags.description: Prominently features a character who is a Dullahan, a creature from Irish Folklore with a head that can be detached from its main body.

tags.name: Animals
tags.description: Prominently features animal characters in a leading role.

tags.name: Konbini
tags.description: Predominantly features a convenience store.

tags.name: Primarily Adult Cast
tags.description: Main cast is mostly composed of characters above a high school age.

tags.name: Ensemble Cast
tags.description: Features a large cast of characters with (almost) equal screen time and importance to the plot.

title: Zaion: I Wish You Were Here
titleRomaji: i -wish you were here-: Anata ga Koko ni Itehoshii
titleEnglish: Zaion: I Wish You Were Here
titleNative: i -wish you were here- ～あなたがここにいてほしい～
synonyms: i-wish you were here - vorrei tu fossi qui
synopsis: In the future, a meteor crashes into Earth and brings with it a virulent form of life. This virus is known as M34 and attacks humans, turning them into vicious monsters. Most of the human population is wiped out, thus government agencies are formed to fight the virus. One of the groups, NOA, inserts nanomachines into the bodies of its soldiers; these machines allow them to transform and fight off the infected. Unfortunately, the virus mutates and becomes too strong for NOA to handle. Now the fate of the world rests in the hands of 16-year-old girl with the power to defeat the virus. (Source: AniDB)

tags.description: Features characters who undergo horrific transformations or disfigurement, often to their own detriment.
